title: Crisp Croatian Pork Skewers
description: A bitter and crisp Croatian dish featuring ancho chillies and beurre-monte, perfect for a midnight craving, this low-carb-friendly recipe is sure to satisfy your hunger.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, grind the ancho chillies into a fine powder.
In a large bowl, whisk together the beurre-monte, garlic, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Add the pork pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the pork is cooked through and crispy on the outside.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional paprika if desired.
